title: Software Developer
description: We are looking for a Software Developer to build and enhance modern applications used across our technology organization. The ideal candidate has experience in Python, cloud technologies, and secure development practices, and enjoys collaborating in a fast-paced engineering environment.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain secure software applications
Implement DevSecOps practices and CI/CD workflows
Participate in code reviews and security assessments
requirements: Experience with Python or similar languages
Understanding of secure coding and cloud architectures
